name: Mexicali Spoon Bread Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cook and stir meat, onion, green pepper, and garlic in a large skillet until onion is tender and meat is browned. Remove excess fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, corn (undrained), salt, chili powder, pepper, and olives. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer while preparing topping.
4. Mix milk, cornmeal, and 1/2 tsp salt in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until mixture boils. Remove from heat and stir in cheese and beaten eggs (2 large).
5. Pour hot meat mixture into an ungreased casserole dish. Immediately pour topping onto meat mixture.
6. Bake uncovered until a knife inserted in the topping comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Serve hot.
